items.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
items.summary: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

items.title: US not 'turning back' on Asia allies, but expects them to boost defence, says Hegseth
items.summary: The US defense secretary is questioned about US commitment, including further arms deals, at an Asian security summit in Singapore.

items.title: 'Poison seller' who sold toxic chemicals online to people across world admits aiding suicides
items.summary: Kenneth Law admitted charges relating to Canadian victims - but families say he should also be charged in the UK over 79 deaths in Britain.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美扣押伊朗314億元加密幣資產 貝森特揭「經濟怒火」戰果
items.summary: 美國財政部長貝森特（Scott Bessent）29日表示，美國對伊朗的「經濟怒火行動」（Operation Economic Fury），已查扣約10億美元（約314億台幣）...…

items.title: 川普政府擬修改「美墨加協定」汽車半數零組件需產自美國
items.summary: 《華爾街日報》報導，知情人士透露，美國總統川普政府預計將提議修改「美墨加協定」（USMCA），要求汽車必須有一半的零組件和材料產自美國，才能享受該協定下的低關稅。  　按照...…

items.title: 6台人涉詐騙柬埔寨法院羈押 最重可判10年徒刑
items.summary: 柬埔寨警方近日破獲首都金邊一處住宅設立的電信網路詐騙據點、逮捕6名台灣人，金邊初級法院今天下令羈押並以「有組織實施電信詐騙罪」提起公訴，最重可判處10年有期徒刑。  柬中時報報導，柬埔寨...…
